channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Report Highlights Behavioral and Health Changes in President Trump as He Approaches 80
item.description: A recent report has raised concerns about President Donald Trump's fitness for office as he nears his 80th birthday, citing observable behavioral and physical changes. According to The Atlantic's Jona...

item.title: Gbenga Daniel supporters call for boycott of Ogun APC senatorial primaries over safety concerns
item.description: Supporters of former Ogun State Governor and current Ogun East Senator, Gbenga Daniel, don advise make dem no participate for the APC senatorial primaries set for Monday, May 18, 2026, for Ogun East. ...

item.title: Pamela Anderson Open to Romance Again Following Speculation Involving Tom Cruise
item.description: Pamela Anderson, the 58-year-old actress known for her iconic roles and recent career resurgence, is reportedly open to finding love once more. According to sources cited by the Daily Mail, Anderson h...

item.title: President Ruto to Convene Cabinet Meeting After Returning from Azerbaijan as Fuel Price Protests Continue
item.description: President William Ruto is currently attending the 13th World Urban Forum in Baku, Azerbaijan, where he is promoting Kenya's Affordable Housing Programme and urban economic transformation initiatives. ...

item.title: Addressing Child and Adolescent Mental Health Requires Urgent Action
item.description: South Africa, like many countries, is facing a pressing mental health challenge among children and adolescents. With over two billion young people globally, mental well-being is crucial for learning, ...

item.title: BIR Issues Guidelines on Filing Donor’s Tax for Purely Cash Donations
item.description: The Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) released Revenue Memorandum Circular (RMC) No. 10-2026 to provide clear guidance on the tax treatment of purely cash donations in the Philippines. According to the...

item.title: Karachi Magistrate Delays Decision on Anmol Pinky’s Physical Remand in Murder Investigation
item.description: KARACHI: A judicial magistrate in Karachi has put on hold his verdict regarding the police request for the physical remand of Anmol, also known as Pinky, in connection with a murder case. Anmol, alleg...

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in West Africa a public health emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has officially declared the ongoing Ebola outbreak in parts of Central and East Africa a public health emergency of international concern. The outbreak, caused by t...

item.title: Letters Discussing the Restoration and Significance of 24 Sussex Drive
item.description: The letters to the editor published on May 18 cover a variety of current issues, with a particular focus on the restoration of 24 Sussex Drive, the official residence of the Prime Minister of Canada. ...

item.title: Daniel Craig's Hairstyle Transformation for 'Our Friends in the North' (1996)
item.description: In 1996, Daniel Craig appeared with a distinctive long, blonde, and often unkempt hairstyle for his breakout role as George 'Geordie' Peacock in the acclaimed BBC drama serial 'Our Friends in the Nort...

item.title: Iran Proposes Charges for Subsea Internet Cables Passing Through the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has announced plans to impose fees on subsea internet cables running through the strategically important Strait of Hormuz. According to state-linked media and Iranian military officials, companie...

item.title: Yanga’s Challenge to Secure Fifth Consecutive Mainland Premier League Crown
item.description: Young Africans (Yanga) are now in the most crucial stage of the Mainland Tanzania Premier League as they chase their fifth straight title. With 54 points from 23 games, Yanga are still leading the lea...

item.title: AFP warns of ongoing political and informational conflict with China over West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) has urged the nation to treat the ongoing West Philippine Sea (WPS) dispute with China as a form of 'political war.' AFP Chief of Staff Gen. Romeo Brawner, th...

item.title: Little Lorraine gains popularity in Canadian theatres as Cineplex expands screenings nationwide
item.description: The Canadian film Little Lorraine is experiencing strong audience interest in its theatrical release. According to reports, the movie has performed well enough in initial screenings that Cineplex has ...

item.title: Senate Begins Impeachment Proceedings Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate officially convened as an impeachment court to begin the trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. She faces allegations including culpable violation of the 1987 Con...

item.title: Journalist notes unusual redaction of Trump's image in released Epstein files
item.description: The Justice Department (DOJ) came under criticism earlier in 2026 for mishandling the release of files related to Jeffrey Epstein, particularly for improperly redacting or failing to redact sensitive ...

item.title: LetinAR Develops Advanced Optical Modules for Wearable AI Glasses
item.description: South Korean startup LetinAR is pioneering the development of optical modules for AI-enabled smart glasses, a key component that determines usability, image clarity, and power efficiency. Founded in 2...

item.title: CRDB Shareholders Support CEO Continuity Due to Strong Performance
item.description: Shareholders of CRDB Bank Plc don show say dem wan the current Group CEO, Abdulmajid Nsekela, to continue leading the bank even after the 10-year legal term don expire. During the 31st Annual General ...

item.title: Senate convenes as impeachment court for Vice President Sara Duterte, Cayetano remains Senate President
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate formally convened as an impeachment court to begin proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte. Despite speculations and political tension in the hours leadi...

item.title: London Underground drivers to strike over four-day week, causing widespread travel disruption
item.description: London Underground drivers, represented by the Rail, Maritime and Transport (RMT) union, will commence strike action this week in opposition to a proposed four-day working week, despite Transport for ...
